subject: [SDNC] Fix Oauth field
commit_message:
[SDNC] Fix Oauth field

The field redirectUri crashes the oauth feature because
there too many double quotes dumped in the oauth config file

Change-Id: Ia69a1b6185e4a6cab56061d1d168d783d67518f2
Issue-ID: SDNC-1697
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I'm wondering why this is not an issue for 'publicUrl' as well.
In Values.yaml defined like this
```
oauth:
      enabled: false
      tokenIssuer: ONAP SDNC
      tokenSecret: secret
      supportOdlusers: true
      redirectUri: null
      publicUrl: none
```
this should be quoted in the same way.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> I'm wondering why this is not an issue for 'publicUrl' as well.
> In Values.yaml defined like this
> ```
> oauth:
>       enabled: false
>       tokenIssuer: ONAP SDNC
>       tokenSecret: secret
>       supportOdlusers: true
>       redirectUri: null
>       publicUrl: none
> ```
> this should be quoted in the same way.

Now I've got it ;)
orig:
```
    "publicUrl": {{ .Values.config.sdnr.oauth.publicUrl | quote }},
    "redirectUri": "{{ .Values.config.sdnr.oauth.redirectUri | quote |default "null" }}",
```
should be
```
    "publicUrl": {{ .Values.config.sdnr.oauth.publicUrl | quote }},
    "redirectUri": {{ .Values.config.sdnr.oauth.redirectUri |quote | default "null" }},
```
or 
```
    "publicUrl": "{{ .Values.config.sdnr.oauth.publicUrl }}",
    "redirectUri": "{{ .Values.config.sdnr.oauth.redirectUri |default null }}",
```
to be consistent.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5277/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5277/ )

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 116 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: The field redirectUri crashes the oauth feature because there too many double quotes dumped in the oauth config file ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5277/ )
